theme: 20. **小复习（11–19 单元）：重点复习字符串切片、split/join 方法、in 判断**
user_prompt: 我现在要生成的单元主题是：20. **小复习（11–19 单元）：重点复习字符串切片、split/join 方法、in 判断**
raw_text:
[
  {
    "id": 1,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "in判断购物清单",
    "content": "小明想用Python检查字符串'shopping_list = \"苹果,香蕉,橙子\"'中是否包含'苹果'，下面哪个写法是正确的？",
    "options": [
      "if '苹果' in shopping_list:",
      "if shopping_list in '苹果':",
      "if shopping_list.contains('苹果'):",
      "if '苹果'.in(shopping_list):"
    ],
    "answer": "A",
    "hints": [
      "in关键字用于检查子字符串是否在字符串中。",
      "注意in前后的顺序：子字符串 in 字符串。",
      "Python中字符串没有.contains方法，使用in操作符。"
    ],
    "explanation": "在Python中，使用in操作符检查字符串是否包含子字符串，语法是'子字符串 in 字符串'。选项A正确；选项B顺序颠倒；选项C使用了不存在的方法；选项D语法错误。",
    "example": "类似地，if 'a' in 'apple': 会返回True。"
  },
  {
    "id": 2,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "切片取前五",
    "content": "阿强有一个字符串s = 'HelloWorld'，他想获取前5个字符'Hello'，哪个切片最简洁？",
    "options": [
      "s[:5]",
      "s[0:4]",
      "s[1:5]",
      "s[5:]"
    ],
    "answer": "A",
    "hints": [
      "字符串切片从开始索引到结束索引（不包括）。",
      "如果省略开始索引，默认从0开始。",
      "s[:5]表示从索引0到5（不包括5），即前5个字符。"
    ],
    "explanation": "字符串切片s[start:end]获取从start到end-1的字符。s[:5]省略start，默认0，获取索引0到4的字符，即'Hello'。",
    "example": "对于s='Python'，s[:3]返回'Pyt'。"
  },
  {
    "id": 3,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "分割水果列表",
    "content": "小美有一个字符串'apple,banana,cherry'，她想用逗号分割成列表，应该使用哪个方法？",
    "options": [
      "split(',')",
      "split(', ')",
      "splitter(',')",
      "separate(',')"
    ],
    "answer": "A",
    "hints": [
      "split方法用于按分隔符分割字符串。",
      "分隔符是逗号','，没有空格。",
      "Python中没有splitter或separate方法。"
    ],
    "explanation": "字符串的split方法使用指定的分隔符将字符串分割成列表，例如'apple,banana,cherry'.split(',')返回['apple','banana','cherry']。",
    "example": "'a b c'.split(' ')返回['a','b','c']。"
  },
  {
    "id": 4,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "切片取Rock",
    "content": "帮助小华完成代码，从字符串'PythonRocks'中提取'Rock'。",
    "input": null,
    "output": ["Rock"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [
        { "type": "code_block", "lines": [{ "type": "code_line", "value": "s = 'PythonRocks'" }] },
        { "type": "code_inline", "parts": [{ "type": "code", "value": "print(s[" }, { "type": "slot", "index": 0 }, { "type": "code", "value": ":" }, { "type": "slot", "index": 1 }, { "type": "code", "value": "])" }] }
      ]
    },
    "options": ["6", "7", "9", "10", "5", "11", "0", "4"],
    "answer": [1, 4],
    "explanation": "在字符串'PythonRocks'中，'Rock'从索引6开始到索引10结束（不包括10），所以切片为s[6:10]。",
    "example": "类似地，s='Hello'，s[1:4]返回'ell'。"
  },
  {
    "id": 5,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "连接字母列表",
    "content": "小李有一个列表['a','b','c']，他想用连字符连接成字符串'a-b-c'，补全代码。",
    "input": null,
    "output": ["a-b-c"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [
        { "type": "code_block", "lines": [{ "type": "code_line", "value": "lst = ['a', 'b', 'c']" }] },
        { "type": "code_inline", "parts": [{ "type": "code", "value": "result = " }, { "type": "slot", "index": 0 }, { "type": "code", "value": ".join(lst)" }] },
        { "type": "code_block", "lines": [{ "type": "code_line", "value": "print(result)" }] }
      ]
    },
    "options": ["'-'", "'-'", "-", "'+'", "':'", "''"],
    "answer": [1],
    "explanation": "join方法是字符串方法，用指定的分隔符字符串调用，如'-'.join(lst)将列表连接成以'-'分隔的字符串。",
    "example": "' '.join(['hello', 'world'])返回'hello world'。"
  },
  {
    "id": 6,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "同时检查子串",
    "content": "在字符串'hello world'中，检查是否同时包含'he'和'ld'，下面哪个代码正确？",
    "options": [
      "if 'he' in s and 'ld' in s:",
      "if 'he' and 'ld' in s:",
      "if s.contains('he') and s.contains('ld'):",
      "if 'he' + 'ld' in s:"
    ],
    "answer": "A",
    "hints": [
      "使用in操作符需要为每个子字符串单独检查。",
      "选项B中'he'被当作True，只检查'ld' in s。",
      "Python字符串没有.contains方法。"
    ],
    "explanation": "要检查多个子字符串是否都在字符串中，必须对每个子字符串使用in操作符并用and连接，如'he' in s and 'ld' in s。",
    "example": "类似地，if 'a' in s and 'b' in s: 检查s中是否同时有'a'和'b'。"
  },
  {
    "id": 7,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "处理带空格CSV",
    "content": "有一个字符串'apple, banana, cherry'，想去除空格后分割，然后连接用分号，哪个代码正确？",
    "options": [
      "items = s.split(', '); result = ';'.join(items)",
      "items = s.split(','); result = ';'.join(items.strip())",
      "items = s.split(','); result = ';'.join([item.strip() for item in items])",
      "result = s.replace(' ', '').split(',').join(';')"
    ],
    "answer": "C",
    "hints": [
      "split(',')会保留空格，需要去除每个项目的空格。",
      "strip()方法去除字符串两端的空格。",
      "join方法需要字符串调用，列表没有join方法。"
    ],
    "explanation": "正确做法是先按逗号分割得到列表，然后用列表推导式对每个项目使用strip()去除空格，最后用';'.join连接。",
    "example": "' a , b '.split(',')得到[' a ', ' b ']，经strip后连接成'a;b'。"
  },
  {
    "id": 8,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "切片与相等检查",
    "content": "给定字符串s = 'PythonProgramming'，想检查切片s[6:10]是否等于'Prog'，哪个代码正确？",
    "options": [
      "if s[6:10] == 'Prog':",
      "if s[6:10] in 'Prog':",
      "if 'Prog' in s[6:10]:",
      "if s[6:10].contains('Prog'):"
    ],
    "answer": "A",
    "hints": [
      "切片s[6:10]返回一个字符串，可以直接用==比较。",
      "in操作符用于检查子字符串，而不是相等。",
      "Python字符串没有.contains方法。"
    ],
    "explanation": "字符串切片返回子字符串，可以使用==操作符直接与另一个字符串比较是否相等。",
    "example": "s='hello'，s[1:4] == 'ell'返回True。"
  },
  {
    "id": 9,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "域名检查",
    "content": "补全代码，从字符串'python.org'中提取扩展名并检查是否为'.org'。",
    "input": null,
    "output": ["It is an org domain"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [
        { "type": "code_block", "lines": [{ "type": "code_line", "value": "s = 'python.org'" }] },
        { "type": "code_inline", "parts": [{ "type": "code", "value": "extension = s[" }, { "type": "slot", "index": 0 }, { "type": "code", "value": ":]" }] },
        { "type": "code_inline", "parts": [{ "type": "code", "value": "if extension " }, { "type": "slot", "index": 1 }, { "type": "code", "value": " '.org':" }] },
        { "type": "code_block", "lines": [{ "type": "code_line", "value": "    print('It is an org domain')" }] }
      ]
    },
    "options": ["6", "7", "8", "in", "==", "!=", "not in"],
    "answer": [1, 5],
    "explanation": "在'python.org'中，从索引6开始切片得到'.org'，然后使用==操作符检查是否等于'.org'。",
    "example": "s='example.com'，s[7:]得到'.com'，可用==检查。"
  },
  {
    "id": 10,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "CSV转换",
    "content": "补全代码，将逗号分隔的字符串转换为用分号分隔，并去除空格。",
    "input": null,
    "output": ["apple;banana;cherry"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [
        { "type": "code_block", "lines": [{ "type": "code_line", "value": "s = 'apple, banana, cherry'" }] },
        { "type": "code_inline", "parts": [{ "type": "code", "value": "items = s.split(" }, { "type": "slot", "index": 0 }, { "type": "code", "value": ")" }] },
        { "type": "code_inline", "parts": [{ "type": "code", "value": "items = [item." }, { "type": "slot", "index": 1 }, { "type": "code", "value": "() for item in items]" }] },
        { "type": "code_inline", "parts": [{ "type": "code", "value": "result = '" }, { "type": "slot", "index": 2 }, { "type": "code", "value": "'.join(items)" }] },
        { "type": "code_block", "lines": [{ "type": "code_line", "value": "print(result)" }] }
      ]
    },
    "options": [",", ", ", "strip", "trim", "lstrip", ";", ":", "-"],
    "answer": [2, 3, 6],
    "explanation": "首先用', '分割字符串去除空格，然后对每个项目使用strip()去除两端空格，最后用';'连接列表。",
    "example": "'a , b '.split(', ')得到['a', 'b']，经strip后连接成'a;b'。"
  },
  {
    "id": 11,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "步长切片",
    "content": "字符串s = 'abcdefgh'，s[1:6:2]返回什么？",
    "options": [
      "'bdf'",
      "'aceg'",
      "'bdfh'",
      "'ac eg'"
    ],
    "answer": "A",
    "hints": [
      "切片s[start:end:step]从start到end-1，步长为step。",
      "索引1是'b'，步长2取下一个索引3、5。",
      "计算索引：1-b,3-d,5-f，所以是'bdf'。"
    ],
    "explanation": "s[1:6:2]从索引1开始到6结束（不包括6），步长2，取索引1、3、5的字符，即'b'、'd'、'f'，组成'bdf'。",
    "example": "s='123456'，s[0:5:2]返回'135'。"
  },
  {
    "id": 12,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "检查开头",
    "content": "想用in操作符检查字符串s是否以'he'开头，哪个代码正确？",
    "options": [
      "if 'he' in s and s.find('he') == 0:",
      "if 'he' in s[0:2]:",
      "if s[0:2] == 'he':",
      "if 'he' == s[:2]:"
    ],
    "answer": "D",
    "hints": [
      "切片s[:2]获取前两个字符，可直接比较。",
      "in操作符在切片中检查，但切片可能不是完整子串。",
      "选项D使用==直接比较，最简洁。"
    ],
    "explanation": "检查字符串是否以'he'开头，最简单的是使用切片s[:2]获取前两个字符，然后用==与'he'比较。",
    "example": "s='hello'，s[:2] == 'he'返回True。"
  },
  {
    "id": 13,
    "type": "choice",
    "title": "连接列表错误",
    "content": "有一个字符串列表['a','b','c']，想连接成'a,b,c'，下面哪个写法错误？",
    "options": [
      "','.join(lst)",
      "'-'.join(lst).replace('-',',')",
      "str.join(',', lst)",
      "result = ''; for item in lst: result += item + ','; result = result[:-1]"
    ],
    "answer": "C",
    "hints": [
      "join方法是字符串方法，调用方式是'分隔符'.join(可迭代对象)。",
      "str.join(',', lst)语法错误，str是类名。",
      "其他选项都能正确连接。"
    ],
    "explanation": "join方法必须用字符串实例调用，如','.join(lst)，而str.join(',', lst)是错误的，因为str是类，且参数顺序不对。",
    "example": "正确用法：'-'.join(['x','y'])返回'x-y'。"
  },
  {
    "id": 14,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "URL协议检查",
    "content": "补全代码，处理URL字符串，提取协议并检查是否安全（为'https'）。",
    "input": null,
    "output": ["Secure"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [

        { "type": "code_inline", "parts": [{ "type": "code", "value": "protocol = s.split(" }, { "type": "slot", "index": 0 }, { "type": "code", "value": ")[0]" }] },
        { "type": "code_inline", "parts": [{ "type": "code", "value": "if protocol " }, { "type": "slot", "index": 1 }, { "type": "code", "value": " 'https':" }] },
        { "type": "code_block", "lines": [{ "type": "code_line", "value": "    print('Secure')" }] }
      ]
    },
    "options": ["'://'", "':'", "'/'", "==", "!=", "in", "not in"],
    "answer": [1, 4],
    "explanation": "使用split('://')分割URL，第一部分是协议'https'，然后用==操作符检查是否等于'https'。",
    "example": "'http://example.com'.split('://')[0]返回'http'。"
  },
  {
    "id": 15,
    "type": "fill",
    "title": "字符串反转",
    "content": "补全代码，将字符串'hello'反转并打印。",
    "input": null,
    "output": ["olleh"],
    "code_segments": {
      "segments": [
        { "type": "code_block", "lines": [{ "type": "code_line", "value": "s = 'hello'" }] },
        { "type": "code_inline", "parts": [{ "type": "code", "value": "reversed_s = s[" }, { "type": "slot", "index": 0 }, { "type": "code", "value": "]" }] },
        { "type": "code_block", "lines": [{ "type": "code_line", "value": "print(reversed_s)" }] }
      ]
    },
    "options": ["::-1", ":-1", ":0:-1", "-1::-1", ":]", "[::-1]"],
    "answer": [1],
    "explanation": "字符串切片s[::-1]使用步长-1从后向前切片，实现字符串反转。",
    "example": "s='abc'，s[::-1]返回'cba'。"
  }
]
